zh.Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, Un: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特可姆 聖 尼古拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger De Sydenham於1299年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特希登哈姆時，他的父親William De Sydenham32歲，母親Joan Gothayte25歲。他於1325年與Agnes Boye在英國英格蘭薩默塞特希登哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1347年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特吉迪斯福德享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sydenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger De Sydenham was born in 1299, in Sydenham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Sydenham, was 32 and his mother, Joan Gothayte, was 25. He married Agnes Boye in 1325, in Sydenham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1347, in Kittisford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger De Sydenham est né en 1299, à Sydenham, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Sydenham, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Gothayte, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Boye en 1325, à Sydenham, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1347, à Kittisford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger De Sydenham 1299 in Sydenham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Sydenham 32 und seine Mutter Joan Gothayte 25. Er hat 1325 in Sydenham, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Agnes Boye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1347 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Kittisford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Agnes Boye nel 1325, nel Sydenham, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1347, nel Kittisford, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ko.Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, Un: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 코브 스트 닉홀아스
ko.lifeSummary: Roger De Sydenham(이)가 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 시데함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Sydenham(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Gothayte(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 시데함에서 Agnes Boye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1347년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 키티스퍼드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Combe St Nicholas, Somerset, England, Un: комб ст ничолас, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger De Sydenham родился в 1299 г. в местности сиденам, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Sydenham было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Gothayte, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Boye в 1325 г. в местности сиденам, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1347 г. в местности киттисфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

Se casó con Agnes Boye en 1325, en Sydenham, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
